user.title: PiKVM Connection
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PiKVM device.

data_description.url: The base URL of your PiKVM device (e.g., https://pikvm.local)
data_description.totp_secret: The TOTP secret key for two-factor authentication

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PiKVM
reauth_confirm.description: The PiKVM credentials are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure PiKVM
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your PiKVM device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to PiKVM device

abort.already_configured: This PiKVM device is already configured

data_description.hdd_hold_time: How long the HDD activity sensor stays ON after the last activity pulse. Higher values produce a more stable sensor.
data_description.ws_reconnect_delay: How long to wait before reconnecting a dropped WebSocket connection.
data_description.http_timeout: Timeout for API requests. Increase for slow or remote PiKVM devices.
